issue_summary: Provide consistent API in LauncherDiscoveryRequestBuilder regarding nullability
javadoc_before:
/** * Add all of the supplied {@code filters} to the request. * *

Warning: be cautious when registering multiple competing * {@link EngineFilter#includeEngines include} {@code EngineFilters} or multiple * competing {@link EngineFilter#excludeEngines exclude} {@code EngineFilters} * for the same discovery request since doing so will likely lead to * undesirable results (i.e., zero engines being active). * * @param filters the {@code Filter}s to add */
javadoc_after:
/** * Add all of the supplied {@code filters} to the request. * *

Warning: be cautious when registering multiple competing * {@link EngineFilter#includeEngines include} {@code EngineFilters} or multiple * competing {@link EngineFilter#excludeEngines exclude} {@code EngineFilters} * for the same discovery request since doing so will likely lead to * undesirable results (i.e., zero engines being active). * * @param filters the {@code Filter}s to add; never {@code null} * @return this builder for method chaining */
